item.title: Expand blueprint library to 10 reference masterclasses
item.intent: ClawHQ must ship with 10 curated reference blueprints, each a deep demonstration of a real use case. 7 blueprints exist. The remaining 3 must be production-quality — reading them should make a target user think 'this person understands how I actually work.'
item.description: Strategy fix #2 (Community) requires 10 curated reference blueprints, not a community marketplace. Current count: 7 blueprints. The gap is 3 more. Each blueprint must be a masterclass for its use case — selection criteria: (1) significant OpenClaw user population has this need, (2) the use case has well-known failure modes ClawHQ handles correctly by default, (3) demonstrates security-by-default in a concrete domain. Candidates: Research Copilot (Tavily, summarization, citation), Founders Ops (communications, scheduling, prioritization), Personal Finance Assistant (read-only bank feeds, alerts, summaries — no write access). Each requires identity file content, tool selection, skill bundle, cron jobs, security posture, and integration config.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Blueprint library contains exactly 10 blueprints, each with complete YAML (identity, tools, skills, cron, security_posture, autonomy)

acceptanceCriteria: Each new blueprint includes at least one domain-specific security constraint not in the default posture
All 10 blueprints validate against the blueprint spec (once FEAT-121 is complete)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Each blueprint has a corresponding tutorial draft in docs/articles/ for the dev-as-content pipeline
